title: Crumbly Japanese Vanilla Bean Crumble
description: A savory, crumbly Japanese dish featuring vanilla bean paste and smoke, keto-friendly for weeknight meals.

ingredients.name: vanilla bean seeds from 2 whole vanilla beans

instructions: Blend dates until smooth in a food processor or blender.
In a mixing bowl, combine the blended date paste with vanilla bean seeds, vanilla bean paste, coconut oil, and honey or stevia.
Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined. The mixture should be spreadable but not runny.
Add almond flour and ground flaxseed to the mixture. Mix together gently until a crumbly consistency is achieved.
Spoon the crumble mixture onto a pre-lined baking sheet or plate.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking time. The crumble should be golden brown and crisp on top.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
